name: sglang-kimi-w4a16-moe-optimize
description: Add W4A16 support to CK MoE kernels and optimize Kimi-K2.5 (1T MoE, compressed-tensors INT4) decode latency on 8x AMD MI355X GPUs using SGLang with TP=8
source: AMD_OSS issue #4: kimi2.5 model support — CK MoE kernels lack W4A16 dispatch, model falls back to slower Triton path
